shortForecast: Patchy Fog then Rain Showers Likely
name: Tonight
detailedForecast: Patchy fog between 10pm and 1am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers between 1am and 2am, then rain showers likely and patchy fog. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 47. East wind 2 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
